final:
module sram_16bit (
    input wire clk,
    input wire we, // write enable
    input wire re, // read enable
    input wire [3:0] addr, // 4-bit address for 16 locations
    input wire [15:0] data_in, // 16-bit data input
    output reg [15:0] data_out // 16-bit data output
);
    reg [15:0] memory [0:15]; // 16 locations of 16-bit memory

    always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (we) begin memory[addr] <= data_in ; // Write data to memory at specified address
  end
  end

  always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (re) begin data_out <= memory[addr] ; // Read data from memory at specified address
  end
  end
endmodule
